subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-'Alí! Goodly is thy name. God willing, thou shalt attain unto that which befitteth this name through divine grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد العلی اسمت نیکوست انشاء الله بما ینبغی لهذا الاسم فائز باشی عنایت حق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
